releaseNotes:
✨ v3.5 — Major Update

🎨 Completely redesigned UI
• Deep navy theme, premium look
• Smooth sidebar slide-in animation
• Channel fade transition on switch
• Bigger channel items with logo cards
• Improved banner with slide-up animation
• Channel number overlay shows channel name preview

⭐ New features
• Favorites — long-press OK on any channel
• Search — type while sidebar is open
• Live clock in sidebar header
• Favorites filter tab

⚡ Performance
• Faster list updates with AsyncListDiffer
• Optimized memory usage
• Smoother animations throughout
